message:
feat(sql): implement STRING_AGG, GROUP_CONCAT, MEDIAN, and STDDEV/VARIANCE variants

Completes aggregate function execution in main thread:
- STRING_AGG(col, separator) with custom separator support
- GROUP_CONCAT(col) with comma default
- MEDIAN(col) with odd/even count handling
- STDDEV/STDDEV_SAMP/STDDEV_POP (sample vs population)
- VARIANCE/VAR_SAMP/VAR_POP (sample vs population)

Updates 5 aggregate function detection lists in lanceql.js.
Adds 2 Playwright tests covering all new aggregates and edge cases.
